017package org.apache.juneau.http.classic;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.net.*;
023import java.time.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027import org.apache.http.*;
028import org.apache.http.NameValuePair;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Accept;
034import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptCharset;
035import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptEncoding;
036import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptLanguage;
037import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.AcceptRanges;
038import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Age;
039import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Allow;
040import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Authorization;
041import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.CacheControl;
042import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ClientVersion;
043import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Connection;
044import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentDisposition;
045import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentEncoding;
046import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentLanguage;
047import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentLength;
048import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentLocation;
049import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentRange;
050import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ContentType;
051import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Date;
052import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Debug;
053import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ETag;
054import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Expect;
055import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Expires;
056import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Forwarded;
057import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.From;
058import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Host;
059import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfMatch;
060import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfModifiedSince;
061import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfNoneMatch;
062import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfRange;
063import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.IfUnmodifiedSince;
064import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.LastModified;
065import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Location;
066import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.MaxForwards;
067import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.NoTrace;
068import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Origin;
069import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Pragma;
070import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ProxyAuthenticate;
071import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.ProxyAuthorization;
072import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Range;
073import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Referer;
074import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.RetryAfter;
075import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Server;
076import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.TE;
077import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Thrown;
078import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Trailer;
079import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.TransferEncoding;
080import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Upgrade;
081import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.UserAgent;
082import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Vary;
083import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Via;
084import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.Warning;
085import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.WwwAuthenticate;
086import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.part.*;
087import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
088import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
089import org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi.*;
090
091/**
092 * Standard predefined HTTP headers.
093 *
094 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
095 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestCommonBasics">juneau-rest-common Basics</a>
096 * </ul>
097 */
098@SuppressWarnings({
099   "java:S3740" // Raw Supplier/Header types used in factory methods where HTTP header value type cannot be statically parameterized
100})
101public class HttpHeaders {
102
103   /**
104    * Prevents instantiation.
105    */
106   private HttpHeaders() {}
107
108   /** Accept header for <c>application/atom+xml</c>. */
109   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_ATOM_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_ATOM_XML;
110   /** Accept header for <c>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</c>. */
111   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED = Accept.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED;
112   /** Accept header for <c>application/json</c>. */
113   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_JSON = Accept.APPLICATION_JSON;
114   /** Accept header for <c>application/octet-stream</c>. */
115   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM = Accept.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM;
116   /** Accept header for <c>application/soap+xml</c>. */
117   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_SOAP_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_SOAP_XML;
118   /** Accept header for <c>application/svg+xml</c>. */
119   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_SVG_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_SVG_XML;
120   /** Accept header for <c>application/xhtml+xml</c>. */
121   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_XHTML_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_XHTML_XML;
122   /** Accept header for <c>application/xml</c>. */
123   public static final Accept ACCEPT_APPLICATION_XML = Accept.APPLICATION_XML;
124   /** Accept header for <c>image/bmp</c>. */
125   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_BMP = Accept.IMAGE_BMP;
126   /** Accept header for <c>image/gif</c>. */
127   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_GIF = Accept.IMAGE_GIF;
128   /** Accept header for <c>image/jpeg</c>. */
129   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_JPEG = Accept.IMAGE_JPEG;
130   /** Accept header for <c>image/png</c>. */
131   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_PNG = Accept.IMAGE_PNG;
132   /** Accept header for <c>image/svg+xml</c>. */
133   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_SVG = Accept.IMAGE_SVG;
134   /** Accept header for <c>image/tiff</c>. */
135   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_TIFF = Accept.IMAGE_TIFF;
136   /** Accept header for <c>image/webp</c>. */
137   public static final Accept ACCEPT_IMAGE_WEBP = Accept.IMAGE_WEBP;
138   /** Accept header for <c>multipart/form-data</c>. */
139   public static final Accept ACCEPT_MULTIPART_FORM_DATA = Accept.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA;
140   /** Accept header for <c>text/html</c>. */
141   public static final Accept ACCEPT_TEXT_HTML = Accept.TEXT_HTML;
142   /** Accept header for <c>text/plain</c>. */
143   public static final Accept ACCEPT_TEXT_PLAIN = Accept.TEXT_PLAIN;
144   /** Accept header for <c>text/xml</c>. */
145   public static final Accept ACCEPT_TEXT_XML = Accept.TEXT_XML;
146   /** Accept header for <c>*&#47;*</c> (all media types). */
147   public static final Accept ACCEPT_WILDCARD = Accept.WILDCARD;
148
149   /** Content-Type for <c>application/atom+xml</c>. */
150   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_ATOM_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_ATOM_XML;
151   /** Content-Type for <c>application/x-www-form-urlencoded</c>. */
152   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED = ContentType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED;
153   /** Content-Type for <c>application/json</c>. */
154   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_JSON = ContentType.APPLICATION_JSON;
155   /** Content-Type for <c>application/octet-stream</c>. */
156   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM = ContentType.APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM;
157   /** Content-Type for <c>application/soap+xml</c>. */
158   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_SOAP_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_SOAP_XML;
159   /** Content-Type for <c>application/svg+xml</c>. */
160   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_SVG_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_SVG_XML;
161   /** Content-Type for <c>application/xhtml+xml</c>. */
162   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_XHTML_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_XHTML_XML;
163   /** Content-Type for <c>application/xml</c>. */
164   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_APPLICATION_XML = ContentType.APPLICATION_XML;
165   /** Content-Type for <c>image/bmp</c>. */
166   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_BMP = ContentType.IMAGE_BMP;
167   /** Content-Type for <c>image/gif</c>. */
168   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_GIF = ContentType.IMAGE_GIF;
169   /** Content-Type for <c>image/jpeg</c>. */
170   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_JPEG = ContentType.IMAGE_JPEG;
171   /** Content-Type for <c>image/png</c>. */
172   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_PNG = ContentType.IMAGE_PNG;
173   /** Content-Type for <c>image/svg+xml</c>. */
174   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_SVG = ContentType.IMAGE_SVG;
175   /** Content-Type for <c>image/tiff</c>. */
176   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_TIFF = ContentType.IMAGE_TIFF;
177   /** Content-Type for <c>image/webp</c>. */
178   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_IMAGE_WEBP = ContentType.IMAGE_WEBP;
179   /** Content-Type for <c>multipart/form-data</c>. */
180   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_MULTIPART_FORM_DATA = ContentType.MULTIPART_FORM_DATA;
181   /** Content-Type for <c>text/html</c>. */
182   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_TEXT_HTML = ContentType.TEXT_HTML;
183   /** Content-Type for <c>text/plain</c>. */
184   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_TEXT_PLAIN = ContentType.TEXT_PLAIN;
185   /** Content-Type for <c>text/xml</c>. */
186   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_TEXT_XML = ContentType.TEXT_XML;
187   /** Content-Type for <c>*&#47;*</c> (all media types). */
188   public static final ContentType CONTENTTYPE_WILDCARD = ContentType.WILDCARD;
189
190   /**
191    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header.
192    *
193    * @param value
194    *    The header value.
195    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
196    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
197    */
198   public static final Accept accept(MediaRanges value) {
199      return Accept.of(value);
200   }
201
202   /**
203    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header.
204    *
205    * @param value
206    *    The header value.
207    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
208    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
209    */
210   public static final Accept accept(MediaType value) {
211      return Accept.of(value);
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header.
216    *
217    * @param value
218    *    The header value.
219    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link MediaRanges#of(String)}.
220    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
221    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
222    */
223   public static final Accept accept(String value) {
224      return Accept.of(value);
225   }
226
227   /**
228    * Creates a new {@link Accept} header with a delayed value.
229    *
230    * <p>
231    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
232    *
233    * @param value
234    *    The header value.
235    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
236    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
237    */
238   public static final Accept accept(Supplier<MediaRanges> value) {
239      return Accept.of(value);
240   }
241
242   /**
243    * Creates a new {@link AcceptCharset} header.
244    *
245    * @param value
246    *    The header value.
247    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link StringRanges#of(String)}.
248    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
249    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
250    */
251   public static final AcceptCharset acceptCharset(String value) {
252      return AcceptCharset.of(value);
253   }
254
255   /**
256    * Creates a new {@link AcceptCharset} header.
257    *
258    * @param value
259    *    The header value.
260    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
261    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
262    */
263   public static final AcceptCharset acceptCharset(StringRanges value) {
264      return AcceptCharset.of(value);
265   }
266
267   /**
268    * Creates a new {@link AcceptCharset} header with a delayed value.
269    *
270    * <p>
271    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
272    *
273    * @param value
274    *    The supplier of the header value.
275    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
276    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
277    */
278   public static final AcceptCharset acceptCharset(Supplier<StringRanges> value) {
279      return AcceptCharset.of(value);
280   }
281
282   /**
283    * Creates a new {@link AcceptEncoding} header.
284    *
285    * @param value
286    *    The header value.
287    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link StringRanges#of(String)}.
288    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
289    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
290    */
291   public static final AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(String value) {
292      return AcceptEncoding.of(value);
293   }
294
295   /**
296    * Creates a new {@link AcceptEncoding} header.
297    *
298    * @param value
299    *    The header value.
300    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
301    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
302    */
303   public static final AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(StringRanges value) {
304      return AcceptEncoding.of(value);
305   }
306
307   /**
308    * Creates a new {@link AcceptEncoding} header with a delayed value.
309    *
310    * <p>
311    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
312    *
313    * @param value
314    *    The supplier of the header value.
315    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
316    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
317    */
318   public static final AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(Supplier<StringRanges> value) {
319      return AcceptEncoding.of(value);
320   }
321
322   /**
323    * Creates a new {@link AcceptLanguage} header.
324    *
325    * @param value
326    *    The header value.
327    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link StringRanges#of(String)}.
328    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
329    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
330    */
331   public static final AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(String value) {
332      return AcceptLanguage.of(value);
333   }
334
335   /**
336    * Creates a new {@link AcceptLanguage} header.
337    *
338    * @param value
339    *    The header value.
340    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
341    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
342    */
343   public static final AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(StringRanges value) {
344      return AcceptLanguage.of(value);
345   }
346
347   /**
348    * Creates a new {@link AcceptLanguage} header with a delayed value.
349    *
350    * <p>
351    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
352    *
353    * @param value
354    *    The supplier of the header value.
355    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
356    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
357    */
358   public static final AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(Supplier<StringRanges> value) {
359      return AcceptLanguage.of(value);
360   }
361
362   /**
363    * Creates a new {@link AcceptRanges} header.
364    *
365    * @param value
366    *    The header value.
367    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
368    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
369    */
370   public static final AcceptRanges acceptRanges(String value) {
371      return AcceptRanges.of(value);
372   }
373
374   /**
375    * Creates a new {@link AcceptRanges} header with a delayed value.
376    *
377    * <p>
378    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
379    *
380    * @param value
381    *    The supplier of the header value.
382    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
383    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
384    */
385   public static final AcceptRanges acceptRanges(Supplier<String> value) {
386      return AcceptRanges.of(value);
387   }
388
389   /**
390    * Creates a new {@link Age} header.
391    *
392    * @param value
393    *    The header value.
394    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
395    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
396    */
397   public static final Age age(Integer value) {
398      return Age.of(value);
399   }
400
401   /**
402    * Creates a new {@link Age} header.
403    *
404    * @param value
405    *    The header value.
406    *    <br>Must be parsable using {@link Integer#parseInt(String)}.
407    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
408    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
409    */
410   public static final Age age(String value) {
411      return Age.of(value);
412   }
413
414   /**
415    * Creates a new {@link Age} header with a delayed value.
416    *
417    * <p>
418    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
419    *
420    * @param value
421    *    The supplier of the header value.
422    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
423    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
424    */
425   public static final Age age(Supplier<Integer> value) {
426      return Age.of(value);
427   }
428
429   /**
430    * Creates a new {@link Allow} header.
431    *
432    * @param value
433    *    The header value.
434    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
435    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
436    */
437   public static final Allow allow(String value) {
438      return Allow.of(value);
439   }
440
441   /**
442    * Creates a new {@link Allow} header.
443    *
444    * @param value
445    *    The header value.
446    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
447    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
448    */
449   public static final Allow allow(String...value) {
450      return Allow.of(value);
451   }
452
453   /**
454    * Creates a new {@link Allow} header with a delayed value.
455    *
456    * <p>
457    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
458    *
459    * @param value
460    *    The supplier of the header value.
461    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
462    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
463    */
464   public static final Allow allow(Supplier<String[]> value) {
465      return Allow.of(value);
466   }
467
468   /**
469    * Creates a new {@link Authorization} header.
470    *
471    * @param value
472    *    The header value.
473    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
474    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
475    */
476   public static final Authorization authorization(String value) {
477      return Authorization.of(value);
478   }
479
480   /**
481    * Creates a new {@link Authorization} header with a delayed value.
482    *
483    * <p>
484    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
485    *
486    * @param value
487    *    The supplier of the header value.
488    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
489    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
490    */
491   public static final Authorization authorization(Supplier<String> value) {
492      return Authorization.of(value);
493   }
494
495   /**
496    * Creates a new {@link BasicHeader} header.
497    *
498    * @param name The parameter name.
499    * @param value
500    *    The parameter value.
501    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
502    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
503    */
504   public static final BasicHeader basicHeader(String name, Object value) {
505      return BasicHeader.of(name, value);
506   }
507
508   /**
509    * Creates a new {@link BasicHeader} header with a delayed value.
510    *
511    * <p>
512    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
513    *
514    * @param name The header name.
515    * @param value
516    *    The supplier of the header value.
517    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
518    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
519    * */
520   public static final BasicHeader basicHeader(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
521      return new BasicHeader(name, value);
522   }
523
524   /**
525    * Creates a new {@link BasicBooleanHeader} header.
526    *
527    * @param name The header name.
528    * @param value
529    *    The header value.
530    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
531    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
532    */
533   public static final BasicBooleanHeader booleanHeader(String name, Boolean value) {
534      return BasicBooleanHeader.of(name, value);
535   }
536
537   /**
538    * Creates a new {@link BasicBooleanHeader} header.
539    *
540    * @param name The header name.
541    * @param value
542    *    The header value.
543    *    <br>Must be parsable by {@link Boolean#parseBoolean(String)}.
544    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
545    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
546    */
547   public static final BasicBooleanHeader booleanHeader(String name, String value) {
548      return BasicBooleanHeader.of(name, value);
549   }
550
551   /**
552    * Creates a new {@link BasicBooleanHeader} header with a delayed value.
553    *
554    * <p>
555    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
556    *
557    * @param name The header name.
558    * @param value
559    *    The supplier of the header value.
560    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
561    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
562    */
563   public static final BasicBooleanHeader booleanHeader(String name, Supplier<Boolean> value) {
564      return BasicBooleanHeader.of(name, value);
565   }

584    *
585    * @param value

588    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
589    */
590   public static final CacheControl cacheControl(Supplier<String> value) {
591      return CacheControl.of(value);
592   }
593
594   /**
595    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the {@link #cast(Object)} method can be used on the specified object.
596    *
597    * @param o The object to check.
598    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the {@link #cast(Object)} method can be used on the specified object.
599    */
600   public static boolean canCast(Object o) {
601      if (o == null)
602         return false;
603      var ci = ClassInfo.of(o);
604      return nn(ci) && ci.isAssignableToAny(Header.class, Headerable.class, NameValuePair.class, NameValuePairable.class, Map.Entry.class);
605   }
606
607   /**
608    * Utility method for converting an arbitrary object to a {@link Header}.
609    *
610    * @param o
611    *    The object to cast or convert to a {@link Header}.
612    * @return Either the same object cast as a {@link Header} or converted to a {@link Header}.
613   */
614   @SuppressWarnings({
615      "java:S2681" // Each if-branch has a single return; indentation mismatch is cosmetic, not a logic error
616   })
617   public static Header cast(Object o) {
618      if (o instanceof Header o2)
619         return o2;
620      if (o instanceof Headerable o3)
621         return o3.asHeader();
622      if (o instanceof NameValuePair o4)
623         return BasicHeader.of(o4);
624      if (o instanceof NameValuePairable o5)
625         return BasicHeader.of(o5.asNameValuePair());
626      if (o instanceof Map.Entry e) {
627         return BasicHeader.of(s(e.getKey()), s(e.getValue()));
628      }
629      throw rex("Object of type {0} could not be converted to a Header.", cn(o));
630   }
631

744    * </p>
745    *
746    * @param filename Suggested download name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>, blank, or contain CR/LF.
747    * @return A non-<jk>null</jk> header.
748    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If {@code filename} is invalid.
749    */
750   public static final ContentDisposition contentDispositionAttachment(String filename) {
751      return ContentDisposition.attachment(filename);

1192    *
1193    * @param name The header name.
1194    * @param value
1195    *    The header value.
1196    *    <br>Must be a comma-delimited list of entity validator values (e.g. <js>"\"xyzzy\", \"r2d2xxxx\", \"c3piozzzz\""</js>).
1197    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1198    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1199    */
1200   public static final BasicEntityTagsHeader entityTagsHeader(String name, String value) {
1201      return BasicEntityTagsHeader.of(name, value);
1202   }
1203
1204   /**
1205    * Creates a new {@link BasicEntityTagsHeader} header with a delayed value.
1206    *
1207    * <p>
1208    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1209    *
1210    * @param name The header name.
1211    * @param value
1212    *    The supplier of the header value.
1213    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1214    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1215    */
1216   public static final BasicEntityTagsHeader entityTagsHeader(String name, Supplier<EntityTags> value) {
1217      return BasicEntityTagsHeader.of(name, value);
1218   }
1219
1220   /**
1221    * Creates a new {@link ETag} header.
1222    *
1223    * @param value
1224    *    The header value.
1225    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1226    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1227    */
1228   public static final ETag eTag(EntityTag value) {
1229      return ETag.of(value);
1230   }
1231
1232   /**
1233    * Creates a new {@link ETag} header.
1234    *
1235    * @param value
1236    *    The header value.
1237    *    <br>Must be an entity tag value (e.g. <js>"\"xyzzy\""</js>).
1238    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1239    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1240    */
1241   public static final ETag eTag(String value) {
1242      return ETag.of(value);
1243   }
1244
1245   /**
1246    * Creates a new {@link ETag} header with a delayed value.

1248    * <p>
1249    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.

1251    * @param value
1252    *    The supplier of the header value.

1254    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1255    */
1256   public static final ETag eTag(Supplier<EntityTag> value) {
1257      return ETag.of(value);
1258   }

1293    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1294    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1295    */
1296   public static final Expires expires(String value) {

1381   /**
1382    * Creates a new {@link Header} of the specified type.
1383    *
1384    * <p>
1385    * Same as {@link #header(Class, String, Object)} but the header name is pulled from the {@link org.apache.juneau.http.Header#name() @Header(name)} or
1386    *    {@link org.apache.juneau.http.Header#value() @Header(value)} annotations.
1387    *
1388    * @param <T> The header implementation class.
1389    * @param type The header implementation class.
1390    * @param value The header value.
1391    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1392    */
1393   public static final <T extends Header> T header(Class<T> type, Object value) {
1394      return HeaderBeanMeta.of(type).construct(null, value);
1395   }
1396
1397   /**
1398    * Creates a new {@link Header} of the specified type.
1399    *
1400    * <p>
1401    * The implementation class must have a public constructor taking in one of the following argument lists:
1402    * <ul>
1403    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(String <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1404    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(Object <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1405    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(String <jv>headerName</jv>, String <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1406    *    <li><c><jk>public</jk> X(String <jv>headerName</jv>, Object <jv>headerValue</jv>)</c>
1407    * </ul>
1408    *
1409    * @param <T> The header implementation class.
1410    * @param type The header implementation class.
1411    * @param name The header name.
1412    * @param value The header value.
1413    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1414    */
1415   public static final <T extends Header> T header(Class<T> type, String name, Object value) {
1416      return HeaderBeanMeta.of(type).construct(name, value);
1417   }
1418
1419   /**
1420    * Instantiates a new {@link org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.HeaderList}.
1421    *
1422    * @return A new empty builder.
1423    */
1424   public static final HeaderList headerList() {
1425      return HeaderList.create();
1426   }
1427
1428   /**
1429    * Creates a new {@link HeaderList} initialized with the specified headers.
1430    *
1431    * @param headers The headers to add to the list.  <jk>null</jk> entries are ignored.
1432    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1433    */
1434   public static final HeaderList headerList(Header...headers) {
1435      return HeaderList.of(headers);
1436   }
1437
1438   /**
1439    * Creates a new {@link HeaderList} initialized with the specified headers.
1440    *
1441    * @param headers The headers to add to the list.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.  <jk>null</jk> entries are ignored.
1442    * @return A new unmodifiable instance, never <jk>null</jk>.
1443    */
1444   public static final HeaderList headerList(List<Header> headers) {
1445      return HeaderList.of(headers);
1446   }
1447
1448   /**
1449    * Creates a new {@link HeaderList} initialized with the specified name/value pairs.
1450    *
1451    * @param pairs
1452    *    Initial list of pairs.
1453    *    <br>Must be an even number of parameters representing key/value pairs.
1454    * @throws RuntimeException If odd number of parameters were specified.
1455    * @return A new instance.
1456    */
1457   public static HeaderList headerList(String...pairs) {
1458      return HeaderList.ofPairs(pairs);
1459   }
1460
1461   /**
1462    * Creates a new {@link Host} header.
1463    *
1464    * @param value
1465    *    The header value.
1466    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1467    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1468    */
1469   public static final Host host(String value) {
1470      return Host.of(value);
1471   }

1473   /**
1474    * Creates a new {@link Host} header with a delayed value.
1475    *
1476    * <p>

1479    * @param value
1480    *    The supplier of the header value.

1482    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1483    */
1484   public static final Host host(Supplier<String> value) {
1485      return Host.of(value);
1486   }

1503    * @param value

1506    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1507    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the value is <jk>null</jk>.

1611    * @param value

1620   /**
1621    * Creates a new {@link IfRange} header.
1622    *
1623    * @param value
1624    *    The header value.
1625    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1626    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1627    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.

1629   public static final IfRange ifRange(String value) {
1630      return IfRange.of(value);
1631   }

1633   /**
1634    * Creates a new {@link IfRange} header with a delayed value.
1635    *

1637    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1638    *
1639    * @param value
1640    *    The supplier of the header value.
1641    *    <br>Supplier must supply either {@link EntityTag} or {@link ZonedDateTime} objects.
1642    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1643    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1644    */
1645   public static final IfRange ifRange(Supplier<?> value) {
1646      return IfRange.of(value);
1647   }
1648
1649   /**

1651    *
1652    * @param value
1653    *    The header value.
1654    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.

1656    */
1657   public static final IfRange ifRange(ZonedDateTime value) {
1658      return IfRange.of(value);
1659   }

1701   /**
1702    * Creates a new {@link BasicIntegerHeader} header.
1703    *
1704    * @param name The header name.
1705    * @param value
1706    *    The header value.
1707    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1708    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1709    */
1710   public static final BasicIntegerHeader integerHeader(String name, Integer value) {
1711      return BasicIntegerHeader.of(name, value);
1712   }
1713
1714   /**
1715    * Creates a new {@link BasicIntegerHeader} header.
1716    *
1717    * @param name The header name.
1718    * @param value
1719    *    The header value.
1720    *    <br>Must be parsable using {@link Integer#parseInt(String)}.
1721    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1722    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1723    */
1724   public static final BasicIntegerHeader integerHeader(String name, String value) {
1725      return BasicIntegerHeader.of(name, value);
1726   }
1727
1728   /**
1729    * Creates a new {@link BasicIntegerHeader} header with a delayed value.
1730    *
1731    * <p>
1732    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1733    *
1734    * @param name The header name.
1735    * @param value
1736    *    The supplier of the header value.
1737    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1738    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1739    */
1740   public static final BasicIntegerHeader integerHeader(String name, Supplier<Integer> value) {
1741      return BasicIntegerHeader.of(name, value);
1742   }

1744   /**
1745    * Creates a new {@link LastModified} header.
1746    *
1747    * @param value
1748    *    The header value.
1749    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>).
1750    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1751    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1752    */
1753   public static final LastModified lastModified(String value) {
1754      return LastModified.of(value);
1755   }
1756
1757   /**
1758    * Creates a new {@link LastModified} header with a delayed value.
1759    *
1760    * <p>
1761    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
1762    *
1763    * @param value
1764    *    The supplier of the header value.
1765    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1766    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1767    */
1768   public static final LastModified lastModified(Supplier<ZonedDateTime> value) {
1769      return LastModified.of(value);
1770   }
1771
1772   /**
1773    * Creates a new {@link LastModified} header.
1774    *
1775    * @param value
1776    *    The header value.
1777    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
1778    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
1779    */
1780   public static final LastModified lastModified(ZonedDateTime value) {
1781      return LastModified.of(value);

2222
2223   /**
2224    * Creates a new {@link RetryAfter} header.
2225    *
2226    * @param value
2227    *    The header value.
2228    *    <br>Must be an RFC-1123 formated string (e.g. <js>"Sat, 29 Oct 1994 19:43:31 GMT"</js>) or an integer.
2229    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2230    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2231    */
2232   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(String value) {
2233      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2234   }
2235
2236   /**
2237    * Creates a new {@link RetryAfter} header with a delayed value.
2238    *
2239    * <p>
2240    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2241    *
2242    * @param value
2243    *    The supplier of the header value.
2244    *    <br>Supplier must supply either {@link Integer} or {@link ZonedDateTime} objects.
2245    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2246    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2247    */
2248   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(Supplier<?> value) {
2249      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2250   }
2251
2252   /**
2253    * Creates a new {@link RetryAfter} header.
2254    *
2255    * @param value
2256    *    The header value.
2257    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2258    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2259    */
2260   public static final RetryAfter retryAfter(ZonedDateTime value) {
2261      return RetryAfter.of(value);
2262   }

2264   /**
2265    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header.
2266    *
2267    * @param name The header name.
2268    * @param value
2269    *    The POJO to serialize as the header value.
2270    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2271    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2272    */
2273   public static final SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Object value) {
2274      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value);
2275   }
2276
2277   /**
2278    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header.
2279    *
2280    * @param name The HTTP header name name.
2281    * @param value
2282    *    The POJO to serialize as the header value.
2283    * @param serializer
2284    *    The serializer to use for serializing the value to a string value.
2285    * @param schema
2286    *    The schema object that defines the format of the output.
2287    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, defaults to the schema defined on the serializer.
2288    *    <br>If that's also <jk>null</jk>, defaults to {@link HttpPartSchema#DEFAULT}.
2289    *    <br>Only used if serializer is schema-aware (e.g. {@link OpenApiSerializer}).
2290    *    <br>Can also be a {@link Supplier}.
2291    * @param skipIfEmpty If value is a blank string, the value should return as <jk>null</jk>.
2292    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2293    */
2294   public static SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Object value, HttpPartSerializerSession serializer, HttpPartSchema schema, boolean skipIfEmpty) {
2295      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value, serializer, schema, skipIfEmpty);
2296   }
2297
2298   /**
2299    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header with a delayed value.
2300    *
2301    * <p>
2302    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2303    *
2304    * @param name The header name.
2305    * @param value
2306    *    The supplier of the POJO to serialize as the header value.
2307    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2308    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2309    */
2310   public static final SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Supplier<?> value) {
2311      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value);
2312   }
2313
2314   /**
2315    * Creates a new {@link SerializedHeader} header.
2316    *
2317    * <p>
2318    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2319    *
2320    * @param name The HTTP header name name.
2321    * @param value
2322    *    The supplier of the POJO to serialize as the header value.
2323    * @param serializer
2324    *    The serializer to use for serializing the value to a string value.
2325    * @param schema
2326    *    The schema object that defines the format of the output.
2327    *    <br>If <jk>null</jk>, defaults to the schema defined on the serializer.
2328    *    <br>If that's also <jk>null</jk>, defaults to {@link HttpPartSchema#DEFAULT}.
2329    *    <br>Only used if serializer is schema-aware (e.g. {@link OpenApiSerializer}).
2330    *    <br>Can also be a {@link Supplier}.
2331    * @param skipIfEmpty If value is a blank string, the value should return as <jk>null</jk>.
2332    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty.
2333    */
2334   public static SerializedHeader serializedHeader(String name, Supplier<?> value, HttpPartSerializerSession serializer, HttpPartSchema schema, boolean skipIfEmpty) {
2335      return SerializedHeader.of(name, value, serializer, schema, skipIfEmpty);
2336   }

2379    * @param value
2380    *    The header value.
2381    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2382    * @return A new header bean, or <jk>null</jk> if the name is <jk>null</jk> or empty or the value is <jk>null</jk>.
2383    */
2384   public static final BasicStringHeader stringHeader(String name, String value) {
2385      return BasicStringHeader.of(name, value);
2386   }
2387
2388   /**
2389    * Creates a new {@link BasicStringHeader} header with a delayed value.
2390    *
2391    * <p>
2392    * Header value is re-evaluated on each call to {@link Header#getValue()}.
2393    *
2394    * @param name The header name.
2395    * @param value

2399    */
2400   public static final BasicStringHeader stringHeader(String name, Supplier<String> value) {
2401      return BasicStringHeader.of(name, value);
2402   }
